log: --- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Mountain Dwarf — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 8 damage. Mountain Dwarf — Armored Escapist HP: 51/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
